## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style and eslint configuration of the project
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] TypeScript type-check and compilation pass (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tested against expected phonetic mappings and edge cases
- [ ] Dependency lock file (`pnpm-lock.yaml`) is synchronized and tracked
- [ ] Exported APIs are documented with proper JSDoc comments
- [ ] Documentation (`README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `docs/api.md`) is updated
